nasb.text: Now it came about on the same day, that Isaac’s servants came in and told him about the well which they had dug, and said to him, “We have found water.”

esv.text: That same day Isaac’s servants came and told him about the well that they had dug and said to him, “We have found water.”

cnv.text: 那一天，以撒的僕人來把他們挖井的事告訴他，說：“我們找到水了。”

ccb.text: 在同一天，以撒的仆人将挖井的事告诉他，说：“我们找到水了。”

csbs.text: 就在那一天，以撒的仆人们来，把挖井的情况告诉他，说：“我们找到水了。”
